verses.text: Elim panin amaute ding khia uh a, Egypt leitang panin a paikhiat zawh uh a kha nihna ni sawmlenga ni-in Elim leh Sinai kikala om Sin sehnel gamah Israel mihonte khempeuh tung uh hi
Sehnel gamah Moses leh Aaron' tungah Israel mihon buppi phun uh a

amaute tungah, “Kote, sabeel phungah tu-in ka kham takun an ka nek lai-un Egypt leitangah Topa in hong that khin hizaw ta leh maw! Bang hang hiam cih leh mihon buppi a puksisak dingin note in sehnel gamah nong paikhiatpih uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, note-a' dingin vantung panin an kong zusak ding hi. Keima thu a zuih uh leh a zuihloh uh ka theihtelna dingin mite paikhia-in nisimin ni khat khamkhop ding kaikhawm ding uh hi
A ni guk ni-in mite in ni simin a khop ngei zah nih uh khawmin bawl ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses leh Aaron in Israel mite tungah, “Nitak ciangin, Egypt gam panin note hong pai khiatpihpa pen Topa ahihna na thei ding uh hi
Topa' tungah na phunna uh amah in za khin ahih manin zingsang ciangin Topa' vangliatna na mu ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote' tungah na phun uh, kote a bang hi mawk ka hi uh hiam?” a ci hi

Moses in, “Ama tungah na phunnate uh Topa in a zakna hangin, Topa in note' tungah nitak an nek ding sa, zingsangin na kham tak uha na nek ding uh an hong piak ciangin — kote pen a bang hi mawk ka hi uh hiam? Note' phunnate pen kote' tung hiloin Topa' tung ahi hi,” a ci hi
Moses in Aaron' kiangah, “Israel mihon buppi tungah, ‘Amah in note' phunnate za khin ahih manin Topa' mai a nai-ah hong pai un,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Israel mihon buppi tungah Aaron in thu a gen laitakin, amaute in sehnel gam lam en uh a, tua laitakin meii sungah Topa' vangliatna hong kilang hi
Topa in Moses kiangah

“Israel mite' phunnate ka za khin hi. Amaute kiangah, ‘Khuamui ciangin note in sa na ne ding uh a, zingsang ciangin an na kham ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hihna na thei ding uh hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Nitak ciangin vamimte hong leengin giahphual hong tuam hi. Zingsang ciangin giahphual kiimah daitui kia hi
Daitui a kap ciangin gamlak lei maitang tungah a pum ciltel, a khal, vukkhal bangin a pak dikdek leitungah om hi

Israel mite in a muh uh ciangin amaute khatlekhat in, “Bang ahi hiam?” kici uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in tua pen bang hiam cih theilo uh hi. Moses in amaute' kiangah, “ Topa in nek dinga note' tungah hong piak an ahi hi
Topa' thupiak hih bang ahi hi: ‘Note in na milipun na khamzah ding uh khawm un. Na puanbuk sung uhah mi omzah tawh kituakin mi khat lawhta khat ciat na la ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi
Tua mah bangin Israel mite gamta uh hi. Amaute in kaikhawm uh a, pawlkhat in tam, pawlkhat in tawm, kaikhawm uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute in lawhta khat tawh a teh uh ciangin a tam a kaikhawmte-a' dimvallo a, a tawm a kaikhawmte-a' dimlah tuanlo hi. A milipin a khamzah ding khawm uh hi
Moses in amaute' kiangah, “Kuamah in zingsang dong koih kei un,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin amaute in Moses' thu ngailo uh hi. Mi pawlkhat in zingsang dong koih uh a, than omin ning hi. Amaute tungah Moses heh hi
Zingsang simin amaute in a khamzah ding ciat uh khawm uh hi. Ahi zongin ni a sat ciangin leilaka omte tuisuak hi
A ni guk ni-in amaute in an a zah nih, lawhta nih ciat, khawm uh hi. Mihon makaite khempeuh hong pai-in Moses kiangah a gen uh ciangin

amah in amaute kiangah, “ Topa' hong thupiak hih bang ahi hi: ‘Zing ciang pen a thupi-a tawlngak ni, Topa-a' dingin sabbath siangtho ni ahi hi. Na em dingte uh emin, na huan dingte uh huan un la, a omlai teng zingsang ciangdong koih un,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Moses' sawl bangin zingsang dong koih uh hi. Ninglo a, than zong tulo hi
Moses in, “Tuni-in ne un; tuni pen Topa-a' dingin Sabbath ahi hi. Tuni-in a pualamah na mu kei ding uh hi
Note in ni guk sung na khawm ding uh a, ahi zongin sabbath ni ahi a ni sagih ni-in bangmah omlo ding hi,” a ci hi
A ni sagih ni-in a kaikhawm dingin mi pawlkhat kuankhia uh a, ahi zongin amaute in bangmah mulo uh hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Ka thupiakte leh ka thute zuih ding bang tanvei nial ding na hi uh hiam

Thei un! Topa in note' tungah sabbath hong piazo hi. Tua ahih ciangin ni guk ni-in amah in note tungah ni nih khom ding an hong pia hi. Note na milipun nomau' omna ciatah om un. A ni sagih ni-in ama omna panin kuamah paikhia kei hen,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin a ni sagih ni-in mite tawlnga uh hi
Tu-in Israel mite in a min manna ci uh hi. Tua pen nannan tang tawh kibangin a meel kang a, a limna pen khuaizu tawh a kibawl mohpheng tawh kibang hi

Moses in, “ Topa' thupiak hih bang ahi hi: ‘Egypt leitang panin note kong paikhiatpih lai-in sehnel gamah note kong vakna an na suanlekhakte un a muh theihna dingun na khang tawntungun lawhta dim khat kem un,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi
Moses in Aaron kiangah, “Beel khat la in la, tua sungah manna lawhta dim khat koih in la, na khang tawntungun a kikem dingin Topa' mai-ah koih in,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Aaron in kep dingin Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah a koih hi
Amaute a ten' theihna ding uh leitang a tun' mateng, kum sawmli sung Israel mite in manna ne uh a, Kanaan gamgi a tun' matengun manna bek a ne uh ahi hi
(Lawhta khat pen seu khat seh sawmah khat ahi hi.)
